content:
# Debit Card Provisional Credit Policy

## Credit Eligibility
Apply provisional credit only when every required condition is present: can_file, written_statement_provided, account_status_is_open, account_has_no_holds, category_allows_provisional_credit, pin_not_shared_voluntarily, not_new_account_card_not_present_combo. A dispute that can be filed is still not credit-eligible if the account is closed, the account has a hold, the customer voluntarily shared the PIN, or the dispute falls into the new-account/card-not-present combination described by the eligibility list.

## Dispute Categories
Credit consideration is limited to these dispute categories: unauthorized_transaction, card_present_fraud, card_not_present_fraud, atm_cash_discrepancy, duplicate_charge. These categories may receive provisional credit once all eligibility conditions are satisfied.

Do not require provisional credit for these categories: goods_services_not_received, recurring_charge_after_cancellation, atm_deposit_not_credited, incorrect_amount. These may still be valid dispute types, but this policy does not make provisional credit mandatory for them. See "Internal: Atm Cash Discrepancy Handling" and "Internal: Atm Deposit Not Credited Handling" for category-specific intake handling.

## Credit Amount
Set the provisional credit amount using max(0, disputed_amount - customer_max_liability_amount) for fraud/unauthorized categories; otherwise disputed_amount. If the liability calculation produces an unlimited-liability result, the provisional credit result is 0. For customer explanations about liability timing and responsibility, see "Debit Card Error Notice And Liability".
title: Debit Card Provisional Credit Policy
